title: ferrotorch-gpu: log_softmax_f32 backward grad on GPU returns wildly wrong values — surfaced by phase 2.5 (#767)
description: Phase 2.5 conformance probe shows gpu log_softmax f32 grad has delta of ~4.0 absolute (actual ~ -3.9 vs expected ~ 0.19). Root cause likely lives in LogSoftmaxBackward's CUDA path (or its delegated softmax forward used as a saved tensor). Probe: build a focused minimum-shape (1,4) f32 fixture, dump intermediate softmax_output via a hook, compare. The forward GPU log_softmax passes — only the backward grad is broken. Possibly a missing grad_output * (sum-over-rows) accumulation step or a wrong axis.
